markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss API integration for GrowthX to post content directly to Abnormal's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Plan to add a simple rich text field for API-driven content posting, alongside existing modular builder](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [GraphQL API available; Jennifer to set up schema for blogs/glossaries by next week](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Short-term goal: Implement basic API integration for content pushing; long-term: explore full CMS capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### Current CMS Setup and Challenges

  - [Craft CMS with modular builder component](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Modular builder clunky but necessary for some posts (e.g., Evan's blogs with "bells and whistles")](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [API integration challenging due to numerous fields in modular builder](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

### Proposed Solution

  - [Add simple rich text field, possibly as sub-tab or "alternate content field"](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [If content exists in new field, prioritize it over modular builder content](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Allows for easier API integration while maintaining existing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

### Image Handling in Posts

  - [Images need separate upload before inclusion in content](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [GrowthX can handle image insertion as a separate step in their pipeline:](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
    1.  Determine image placement
    2.  Upload image to CMS via API
    3.  Retrieve URL
    4.  Insert image tag in content before final CMS submission

### FAQ/Accordion Component

  - [Currently used in glossary and some blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Typically placed at end of content](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Options for integration:](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
    1.  Custom shortcode in rich text field
    2.  Manual insertion using existing modular builder
    3.  Potential future API adaptation for full modular builder capabilities

### GraphQL API Integration

  - [Jennifer to create GraphQL schema for blogs, glossary, and AI glossary](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Will provide credentials for GrowthX to query and potentially create/edit entries](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Allows for both reading existing content structure and pushing new content](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review GraphQL documentation and assess feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)

### Content Publishing Safeguards

  - [GrowthX to only save as drafts, not publish directly](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Jennifer to ensure API permissions limit to draft status only](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jennifer to create GraphQL schema and provide credentials by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review GraphQL documentation](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Jennifer to set up staging environment access for GrowthX testing](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [Explore adding new rich text field and adjusting layout to accommodate API-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Prioritize basic API integration for Q3, pending other project priorities](https://fathom.video/share/-Wc63gkYJzgDUS1Rgcscs97gc5a4S8o2?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
